description: Look up an element in a collection by key using an accessor. If found, accessor(result) equals key; if not found, no element has that key.

post: if output.found == true then accessor(output.result) == input.key
if output.found == false then no element in input.collection has accessor(element) == input.key
if output.found == true then accessor(output.result) == input.key
if output.found == false then no element in input.collection has accessor(element) == input.key
